requirement_topic.en: Battery cell and module safety — IEC 62619 certification
requirement_topic.zh: 电池电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619认证
requirement_topic.zht: 電池電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619認證

summary.en: Barbados bodies expect BESS cells and modules to demonstrate compliance with IEC 62619:2022 (Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications). BNSI and project stakeholders treat this as the baseline for BESS product safety assessment before BL&P interconnection review.
summary.zh: 巴巴多斯要求BESS电芯和模组证明符合IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电池单体和电池组安全要求）。BNSI及项目相关方将其视为BESS产品安全评估的基准，在BL&P并网审查前适用。
summary.zht: 巴巴多斯要求BESS電芯和模組證明符合IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電池單體和電池組安全要求）。BNSI及項目相關方將其視為BESS產品安全評估的基準，在BL&P併網審查前適用。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 (Safety requirements — secondary lithium cells and batteries for industrial applications)
IEC 62620:2014 (Secondary cells and batteries — industrial applications — designation system)

summary.en: China uses GB 38031-2020 (Electric vehicles — safety requirements for traction battery) as the primary cell safety standard. For stationary storage, GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-ion battery for electric energy storage) applies. Neither GB 38031 nor GB/T 36276 is accepted in Barbados as a substitute for IEC 62619. Technical requirements overlap but certification pathways differ.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 38031-2020（电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求）作为主要电芯安全标准；固定储能方面采用GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）。GB 38031和GB/T 36276均不被巴巴多斯视为IEC 62619的替代标准。技术要求虽有重叠，但认证路径不同。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 38031-2020（電動汽車用動力蓄電池安全要求）作為主要電芯安全標準；固定儲能方面採用GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）。GB 38031和GB/T 36276均不被巴巴多斯視為IEC 62619的替代標準。技術要求雖有重疊，但認證路徑不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 38031-2020 (Electric vehicles — safety requirements for traction battery)
GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-ion battery for electric energy storage)

gap.en: GB 38031 and GB/T 36276 are not accepted as IEC 62619 equivalents in Barbados. Chinese manufacturers must obtain IEC 62619 certification from an internationally accredited certification body (e.g., TÜV, UL, Bureau Veritas, SGS) to satisfy BNSI interlock requirements. This requires test samples and full technical documentation.
gap.zh: GB 38031（动力电池）和GB/T 36276（固定储能）不被巴巴多斯接受为IEC 62619替代标准。中国制造商须从国际认可认证机构（如TÜV、UL、必维、SGS）取得IEC 62619认证以满足BNSI审批链条要求。这需要向认可实验室送样并提交完整技术文件。
gap.zht: GB 38031（動力電池）和GB/T 36276（固定儲能）不被巴巴多斯接受為IEC 62619替代標準。中國製造商須從國際認可認證機構（如TÜV、UL、必維、SGS）取得IEC 62619認證以滿足BNSI審批鏈條要求。這需要向認可實驗室送樣並提交完整技術文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — BNSI conformity prerequisite for project review
mandatory_status.cn: GB 38031 / GB/T 36276 mandatory domestically; not equivalent to IEC 62619 for Barbados

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62619:2022 certification from an internationally accredited body is required for BNSI-led conformity review. Chinese GB 38031 and GB/T 36276 certificates are not accepted as substitutes. Manufacturers without IEC 62619 certification should budget lead time and testing cost before BL&P project review can proceed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴巴多斯合格评估要求来自国际认可机构的IEC 62619:2022认证。中国GB 38031与GB/T 36276证书不被接受为替代。尚无IEC 62619认证的制造商应在BL&P项目审查推进前预留测试周期和测试费用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴巴多斯合格評估要求來自國際認可機構的IEC 62619:2022認證。中國GB 38031與GB/T 36276證書不被接受為替代。尚無IEC 62619認證的製造商應在BL&P項目審查推進前預留測試週期和測試費用。

requirement_topic.en: Second-life and refurbished cells — IEC 63056 requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 二次利用与翻新电芯——IEC 63056要求
requirement_topic.zht: 二次利用與翻新電芯——IEC 63056要求

summary.en: Where BESS systems supplied to Barbados incorporate refurbished, re-used, or second-life lithium cells (for example repurposed EV modules), BNSI expects compliance with IEC 63056:2020 (Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in second-life applications). Project reviewers require disclosure of cell origin and applicable safety standard.
summary.zh: 向巴巴多斯供应BESS系统若采用翻新、再利用或二次利用锂电芯（例如改用途EV模组），BNSI期望符合IEC 63056:2020（含碱性或其他非酸性电解质二次电池——用于二次利用应用的二次锂电池安全要求）。项目审查要求披露电芯来源及适用安全标准。
summary.zht: 向巴巴多斯供應BESS系統若採用翻新、再利用或二次利用鋰電芯（例如改用途EV模組），BNSI期望符合IEC 63056:2020（含鹼性或其他非酸性電解質二次電池——用於二次利用應用的二次鋰電池安全要求）。項目審查要求披露電芯來源及適用安全標準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 63056:2020 (Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in second-life applications)

summary.en: China does not have a published national standard directly equivalent to IEC 63056 for second-life battery safety in stationary BESS. Some manufacturers apply internal processes referencing GB/T 34015 (retired EV battery echelon utilisation), but this is not IEC 63056 conformity. GB/T 34015 mainly covers state-of-health assessment methods and not the full safety framework.
summary.zh: 中国尚无针对固定BESS二次利用电池安全的已发布国家标准与IEC 63056直接对应。部分制造商采用参照GB/T 34015（退役电动汽车蓄电池梯次利用）的内部流程，但这不构成IEC 63056合规。GB/T 34015主要涉及健康状态评估方法，不是IEC 63056完整安全框架。
summary.zht: 中國尚無針對固定BESS二次利用電池安全的已發布國家標準與IEC 63056直接對應。部分製造商採用參照GB/T 34015（退役電動汽車蓄電池梯次利用）的內部流程，但這不構成IEC 63056合規。GB/T 34015主要涉及健康狀態評估方法，不是IEC 63056完整安全框架。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34015-2017 (Retired EV battery echelon utilisation — residual energy test method)
GB/T 34015.2-2020 (Echelon utilisation — grading requirements and test methods)

gap.en: No Chinese national standard is accepted as equivalent to IEC 63056 for second-life BESS cells. Manufacturers supplying second-life battery systems to Barbados must obtain IEC 63056 conformity evidence. New cells with IEC 62619 can avoid this requirement entirely. Cell origin disclosure is still required in Barbados filings regardless of cell age.
gap.zh: 没有中国国家标准被接受为二次利用BESS电芯IEC 63056的等效标准。向巴巴多斯供应二次利用电池系统的制造商须获取IEC 63056合格证明。使用已通过IEC 62619的新电芯可绕开该要求。无论电芯年龄如何，巴巴多斯备案均须披露电芯来源。
gap.zht: 沒有中國國家標準被接受為二次利用BESS電芯IEC 63056的等效標準。向巴巴多斯供應二次利用電池系統的製造商須獲取IEC 63056合格證明。使用已通過IEC 62619的新電芯可繞開該要求。無論電芯使用年限如何，巴巴多斯備案均須披露電芯來源。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory when second-life cells are used — BNSI and project requirement
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent mandatory standard; GB/T 34015 is voluntary guidance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese manufacturers supplying second-life battery systems to Barbados do not have an accepted domestic equivalent to IEC 63056. IEC 63056 certification from an accredited body is required. The simplest compliance path is to supply new cells with IEC 62619 certification, which avoids the IEC 63056 route entirely. Cell origin must be disclosed to project stakeholders regardless of standard applied.
compliance_verdict.zh: 向巴巴多斯供应二次利用电池系统的中国制造商没有被接受的国内IEC 63056等效标准。须获得认可机构的IEC 63056认证。最简单的合规路径是供应具有IEC 62619认证的新电芯，可完全避开IEC 63056路线。无论适用何种标准，仍须向项目相关方披露电芯来源。
compliance_verdict.zht: 向巴巴多斯供應二次利用電池系統的中國製造商沒有被接受的國內IEC 63056等效標準。須獲得認可機構的IEC 63056認證。最簡單的合規路徑是供應具有IEC 62619認證的新電芯，可完全避開IEC 63056路線。無論適用何種標準，仍須向項目相關方披露電芯來源。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical installation safety — BNSI and BL&P building and electrical code compliance
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安装安全——BNSI和BL&P建筑及电气规程合规
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安裝安全——BNSI和BL&P建築及電氣規程合規

summary.en: Barbados electrical installations follow IEC 60364 series (Low-voltage electrical installations) as the main reference wiring and protection code, consistent with legacy UK/IEC practice. BESS electrical installations require compliance with IEC 60364-7 special locations and relevant parts, BNSI safety expectations, and BL&P electrical approval. All wiring, protection devices, and earthing must be configured for the 115/200 V 50 Hz system.
summary.zh: 巴巴多斯电气安装以IEC 60364系列（低压电气安装）作为主要参照布线和保护规程，与英联邦/IEC传统一致。BESS电气安装需符合IEC 60364-7特殊场所及相关章节、BNSI安全要求和BL&P电气审批。所有布线、保护装置和接地须按115/200V 50Hz系统配置。
summary.zht: 巴巴多斯電氣安裝以IEC 60364系列（低壓電氣安裝）作為主要參照佈線和保護規程，與英聯邦/IEC傳統一致。BESS電氣安裝需符合IEC 60364-7特殊場所及相關章節、BNSI安全要求和BL&P電氣審批。所有佈線、保護裝置和接地須按115/200V 50Hz系統配置。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62477-1:2022 (Safety requirements for power electronic converter systems)

summary.en: China uses GB 50054-2011 (Code for design of low voltage power distribution) and GB/T 51048-2014 (Code for design of electrochemical energy storage station) as the primary electrical installation standards. These are structured around China’s 220/380 V grid. Equipment ratings, circuit breaker specifications, and earthing designs differ from IEC 60364 requirements at 115/200 V.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 50054-2011（低压配电设计规范）和GB/T 51048-2014（电化学储能电站设计规范）作为主要电气安装标准。这些标准围绕中国220/380V电网。设备额定值、断路器规格和接地设计与115/200V下的IEC 60364要求不同。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 50054-2011（低壓配電設計規範）和GB/T 51048-2014（電化學儲能電站設計規範）作為主要電氣安裝標準。這些標準圍繞中國220/380V電網。設備額定值、斷路器規格和接地設計與115/200V下的IEC 60364要求不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 50054-2011 (Code for design of low voltage power distribution)
GB/T 51048-2014 (Code for design of electrochemical energy storage station)

gap.en: Chinese electrical installation design documentation referencing GB 50054 and GB/T 51048 at 220/380 V is not accepted by BNSI or BL&P in Barbados. Installation designs must be re-engineered for 115/200 V, referencing IEC 60364 series. BL&P-reviewed local licensed engineer approval is required for Barbados installations. This is an installation-level gap not solved by product certification alone.
gap.zh: 参照GB 50054和GB/T 51048在220/380V下编制的中国电气安装设计文件不被巴巴多斯BNSI或BL&P接受。安装设计必须依据IEC 60364系列按115/200V重新工程设计。巴巴多斯安装须取得BL&P审核的持牌本地电气工程师认证。此为安装层面差距，产品认证单独不能解决。
gap.zht: 參照GB 50054和GB/T 51048在220/380V下編制的中國電氣安裝設計文件不被巴巴多斯BNSI或BL&P接受。安裝設計必須依據IEC 60364系列按115/200V重新工程設計。巴巴多斯安裝須取得BL&P審核的持牌本地電氣工程師認證。此為安裝層面差距，產品認證單獨無法解決。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — BNSI building approval and BL&P electrical installation approval
mandatory_status.cn: GB 50054 / GB/T 51048 mandatory domestically at 220/380 V; not equivalent for Barbados

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] BESS installation design in Barbados must reference IEC 60364 series for 115/200 V 50 Hz and be certified by a BL&P-approved process with local professional review. Documentation based on GB 50054 / GB/T 51048 at 220/380 V is not accepted. This requires local engineering engagement in Barbados.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴巴多斯BESS安装设计必须以115/200V 50Hz下的IEC 60364系列为依据，并通过BL&P批准流程及当地专业审核。基于220/380V下GB 50054/GB/T 51048的文件不被接受。该要求需要巴巴多斯本地工程配合。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴巴多斯BESS安裝設計必須以115/200V 50Hz下的IEC 60364系列為依據，並通過BL&P批准流程及當地專業審核。基於220/380V下GB 50054/GB/T 51048的文件不被接受。該要求需要巴巴多斯本地工程配合。
